consequence_bearing_edges.reason: Shared shell target is reachable from multiple route surfaces.
Data store target feeds multiple reporting routes.
Human review state is shared by approval and audit surfaces.

risk_surfaces.label: Shared shell and navigation
risk_surfaces.reason: A shell change can alter multiple route surfaces.

risk_surfaces.label: Central customer data store
risk_surfaces.reason: A data access change can widen the reporting review surface.

risk_surfaces.label: Human review policy state
risk_surfaces.reason: Policy state changes require human review before any action.

limitations: Static sample only; not generated from a live repository during rendering.
Import edges are approximate and do not claim runtime dependency completeness.
Unsupported capabilities are rejected and displayed as boundary evidence.
Human review is required before any real repository decision.

unsupported_fields.reason: Evidence packs may not request GitHub write access.
Evidence packs may not trigger runtime filesystem scanning.
Q9 uses committed static samples only and does not provide upload storage.
